name: China Universal CSI Hong Kong Stock Through High Dividend Investment Index Launched Fund(LOF)
summary: China Universal CSI Hong Kong Stock Through High Dividend Investment Index Launched Fund(LOF) is a fund managed by China Universal Asset Management that tracks the CSI Hong Kong Stock Connect High Dividend Investment Index. The fund invests in Hong Kong-listed companies with high dividend yields through the Stock Connect program, and it is a Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF).
